then: run check_task.ps1 at the final verification boundary when files changed
run context_tags.ps1 when the prompt needs routed context
run knowledge_select.ps1 with derived tags when source rules are needed
state uncertainty or missing contract when relevant
read target owner document with list_document_keys.ps1 or read_document_item.ps1
edit structured documents with insert_document_item.ps1, move_document_item.ps1, migrate_document_item.ps1, or insert_checked_document_list_item.ps1 when their contract fits
run check_task.ps1 at the final verification boundary

run knowledge_code_context.ps1 before source-code reads or edits — REQUIRED to bring borrowed-before-bespoke, web-research-spike gate, lightweight-futureproof, production-grade defaults, DDD-ADIV-when-possible, readability-first, explicit-diagnosable-flow, and other engineering rules into context

for non-obvious write-code work, ask concise scale/dynamism questions when needed, run a lightweight web research spike for known archetypes/failure modes, and name the chosen implementation mechanism before editing unless the active plan already provides it

choose the profile-specific risk lens before research and planning: business/backend work emphasizes security, data integrity, authorization, auditability, migrations, and RPM/load; gamedev work emphasizes FPS/frame time, active node count, physics/render cost, pooling/activation, determinism, save/runtime state, feel/readability, and diagnostic/log overhead

run project_design_context.ps1 -ProjectRoot <project> when the project's PIPELINE-CONFIG.json declares code_design_required_reads (zone splits, namespace rules, lifecycle constraints, per-project conventions) — writes ignored/project_design_context_gate.json
inspect SCRIPTS.json index before manual work

run check_task.ps1 at the final verification boundary — verifies both ignored/code_context_gate.json and ignored/project_design_context_gate.json are fresh for current HEAD when changed-code is detected
confirm high-cost scope when not already confirmed
run knowledge_code_context.ps1 before source-code reads or edits
for non-obvious structural work, run the web research spike gate and name the implementation mechanism before editing unless already approved in the active plan
choose the profile-specific risk lens before design review: business/backend uses security/data/RPM lenses; gamedev uses FPS/frame-time/runtime-cost/feel lenses
run check_task.ps1 after each intentional verification boundary
run finalize_task_check_commit_push.ps1 when commit and push are required
run pipeline_bootstrap_index.ps1 after routing or index changes
run normalize_json_files.ps1 after JSON contract changes
run compile_pipeline_context.ps1 after source instruction, template, pack, or compiled-context changes
use list_document_keys.ps1 or read_document_item.ps1 for structured document reads
run check_task.ps1 -Audit for repository quality diagnostics
run check_ai_compiled_context.ps1 or compile_pipeline_context.ps1 for compiled-context drift
fix repeatable tooling failures in the owning tool
recommend a script if repetition is likely
